rationale: Coinglass public pages show W perpetual funding rate and OI directionally, but precise real-time 8h funding rate and USD OI figures require a paid API or account login; 30-day correlation coefficients vs BTC, ETH, and NASDAQ are not published as ready-made metrics on any free-tier source (CoinGecko, DefiLlama, alternative.me, FRED) and would require downloading raw OHLC series and computing manually — which is beyond a live data pull.
sources: https://www.coinglass.com/coins/wormhole — funding rate & OI directional view visible on public page but precise values gated behind login/API
https://www.coingecko.com/en/coins/wormhole — price history downloadable for manual correlation calc, but no pre-computed correlation metrics
https://alternative.me/crypto/fear-and-greed-index/ — market-wide sentiment only, no W-specific derivatives data
https://defillama.com/protocol/wormhole — TVL/protocol data only, no derivatives metrics
https://fred.stlouisfed.org — macro/NASDAQ data available but no crypto correlation outputs
